title: hieracium pallescens subsp. calamistratum
intro: Hieracium pallescens subsp. calamistratum, also known as a subspecies of the yellow hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium pallescens subsp. calamistratum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves for topical use.
